title: Are You Traveling to the U.S. for the 2026 World Cup? We’d Like to Hear From You.
summary_full: Tell us about your experience buying tickets, finding a place to stay, making travel arrangements and, if you’re coming to the U.S., dealing with entry requirements.
summary_public: Tell us about your experience buying tickets, finding a place to stay, making travel arrangements and, if you’re coming to the U.S., dealing with entry requirements.
